title: Discover your next home this festive season with Hartenbos Property Group
description: BUSINESS NEWS - The festive season is here...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - The festive season is here – and there’s no better time to explore the beauty, lifestyle, and investment opportunities that Hartenbos and Mossel Bay have to offer.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - The festive season is here – and there’s no better time to explore the beauty, lifestyle, and investment opportunities that Hartenbos and Mossel Bay have to offer."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Whether you're visiting for the holidays or settling in for a coastal break, Hartenbos Property Group invites you to connect with the team recently voted Best Estate Agent in the Best of Mossel Bay Readers’ Choice Awards.","html":"Whether you're visiting for the holidays or settling in for a coastal break, Hartenbos Property Group invites you to connect with the team recently voted Best Estate Agent in the Best of Mossel Bay Readers’ Choice Awards."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"With over 33 years of industry experience behind founder Bobby van Schalkwyk, the group has earned a reputation rooted in local expertise, trusted service, and proven results."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"From family homes and sea-view escapes to holiday investments and lock-up-and-go living, the team knows exactly what makes this coastline so special – because they live it every day.","html":"From family homes and sea-view escapes to holiday investments and lock-up-and-go living, the team knows exactly what makes this coastline so special – because they live it every day."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This festive season, the team is opening their doors, schedules, and diaries to help you discover the properties that match your lifestyle. Whether you're dreaming of a holiday home, considering an investment, or curious about the local market, their knowledgeable agents are ready to guide you.","html":"This festive season, the team is opening their doors, schedules, and diaries to help you discover the properties that match your lifestyle. Whether you're dreaming of a holiday home, considering an investment, or curious about the local market, their knowledgeable agents are ready to guide you."},{"type":"heading","text":"What makes them different?","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"They understand the seasonal rush and know how to match clients with properties quickly and efficiently.","html":"They understand the seasonal rush and know how to match clients with properties quickly and efficiently."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"They bring world-class training, strong community involvement, and genuine passion for helping people find their place on the coast.","html":"They bring world-class training, strong community involvement, and genuine passion for helping people find their place on the coast."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"And most importantly, they’ve been chosen by the community as the best – giving you every reason to trust them with your property journey.","html":"And most importantly, they’ve been chosen by the community as the best – giving you every reason to trust them with your property journey."},{"type":"heading","text":"Visiting Mossel Bay this holiday?","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Make time to meet the award-winning team, view some of the region’s most exciting properties, and experience firsthand why they’re the trusted name in local real estate.","html":"Make time to meet the award-winning team, view some of the region’s most exciting properties, and experience firsthand why they’re the trusted name in local real estate."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your next home might be waiting just around the corner.","html":"Your next home might be waiting just around the corner."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Let Hartenbos Property Group show you around this festive season.","html":"Let Hartenbos Property Group show you around this festive season."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Physical
